regime_justification: USDJPY holding 159.38 near 160 watch line; BOJ meeting in 2 days with 93% consensus to hold at 0.75%; core CPI at 1.8% (below 2% for second month); vol subdued; mixed cross-asset signals; intervention risk elevated but no imminent trigger

domino_stage.label: Pressure Building
domino_stage.justification: USDJPY 18 pips below 160 watch line with BOJ meeting Apr 27-28; Katayama warning on one-sided moves; Iran war pushing ¥/bbl crude to 15,046; core CPI 1.8% accelerating from 1.6% on energy shock; JGB 10Y at 2.44%

1w.label: Watchful
1w.driver: BOJ meeting Apr 27-28: 93% hold priced, but hawkish forward guidance risk if Ueda signals June hike; USDJPY 0.18 yen from 160 watch line; fragile setup

2w.label: Watchful
2w.driver: BOJ decision wash-out week; if hold + hawkish, USDJPY tests 160; if hold + dovish, pressure dissipates; oil elevated at $94.40 WTI continues yen import-cost channel

3w.label: Unlikely
3w.driver: BOJ decision absorbed; US-Iran talks may progress (Islamabad round reported); oil retreats scenario; carry stabilizes unless USDJPY breaks 160 decisively

4w.label: Unlikely
4w.driver: Baseline: BOJ holds, no MOF intervention, ceasefire extension holds; carry regime sticky but contained; unwind averted unless exogenous shock

bottom_line: Stage 1 pressure building: USDJPY 18 pips below 160, BOJ meeting Monday with hold expected but June hike whispers rising (57% priced). Core CPI 1.8%, Iran war pushing ¥/bbl to 15,046. VOL subdued (USDJPY 1M ~7.7%, VIX 18.71, MOVE 66.97). Katayama on record warning one-sided moves; MOF watch line at 160. Grades C/C/D/D: next 48 hours critical (BOJ tone), but unwind not base case unless intervention or surprise hike. Crypto stable (BTC $78,060, +0.5% 24h). Applied unwind prior to 1w grade: data slightly ambiguous (vol low, but proximity to 160 + BOJ risk tilts C over D).

trigger_map.trigger: Energy / Hormuz shock pushing ¥/bbl > prior peak
trigger_map.note: WTI $94.40 × USDJPY 159.38 = ¥15,046/bbl; Iran war stalled talks; Strait closure; oil +14% weekly; import-cost channel active

narrative.p1: Overnight: USDJPY edged down 0.13% to 159.38, holding 18 pips below the 160 watch line ahead of Monday's BOJ decision. VIX and MOVE both fell ~3%, equities ripped to records (S&P +0.8%, Nasdaq +1.6%), and BTC added 0.5% to $78,060—classic risk-on. Oil pulled back 1.5% to $94.40 on tentative Iran-US talk hopes (Islamabad round), but remains +14% weekly. Japan core CPI printed 1.8% (vs 1.6% Feb), below 2% for second month but accelerating on Iran energy shock. No change from yesterday's yellow regime; no stage move—still Stage 1 (Pressure Building). Katayama's April 24 warning on 'one-sided' yen weakness remains live; MOF not intervening yet, but watch line proximity tightens the coil. BOJ meeting Apr 27-28 is the event: 93% hold priced, 57% June hike, Ueda's tone matters.
narrative.p2: Quant anchors: US-JP spread 187 bps (4.31% - 2.44%), down 4 bps as JGB spiked 17 bps weekly to 2.44% (highest since Apr 13). Carry-to-vol proxy: 187 bps / 7.7% vol ≈ 24.3, elevated (low vol inflating the ratio). ¥/bbl crude 15,046 yen (159.38 × 94.40), elevated but off weekly peak. USDJPY 5d pace: -0.13% (negligible), but 18 pips from 160 is the headline. Distance from 60d mean: stretched upward (pair near YTD highs). Domino Sequence: Stage 1 (Pressure Building). BOJ rhetoric shifting (Ueda signaled 'nimble action' on yields, 'scrutinize developments'), JGB yields drifting up, ¥/bbl rising, USDJPY near watch line. Not yet Stage 2 (rate-checks, vol bid) because USDJPY vol is 7.7%, subdued. We are one Ueda hawkish surprise or one 160 break from Stage 2. Grades 1w/2w: C/C. Applied unwind prior to 1w grade: data slightly ambiguous (vol low argues D, but BOJ event risk + 18 pips from 160 + Katayama on record argues C). Prior tilts C. Would otherwise grade D on vol alone. 2w also C: BOJ wash-out week, intervention risk if USDJPY tests 160 post-decision. 3w/4w: D/D. Base case is BOJ holds, signals June hike, USDJPY tests 160 but MOF intervenes verbally only, carry stabilizes. Unwind not base case unless surprise hike or MOF action triggers cascade.
narrative.p3: Crypto liquidity: BTC $78,060, up 0.5% on day, +3.3% 5d. Stable and grinding higher above $78k support. Risk-on sympathy with equities clear (Nasdaq +1.6% same day). BTC open interest direction unavailable, but price action suggests spot accumulation. No stress, no drain—crypto liquidity healthy, tracking equities not FX. For positioning: BTC holding above $78k is constructive; a break below $75k (March lows) would signal risk-off rotation. Currently, crypto is confirming the equity risk-on bid, not the yen carry unwind thesis. Watch for decoupling if USDJPY breaks 160 and Nikkei sells off—that would be the unwind signature. For now, BTC is a buy-the-dip environment, not a de-risk signal.

horizon_rationale.w1_w2: 1w grade C holds through BOJ decision Monday: 93% hold priced, but Ueda's tone on June hike (57% priced) and inflation forecasts (upward revision expected) will drive USDJPY. If hawkish, pair tests 160, MOF intervention risk jumps, grade stays C. If dovish, pressure dissipates, grade could drop to D by w2. 2w stays C because wash-out dynamics are unpredictable: BOJ decision + USDJPY proximity to 160 creates event risk even if hold is consensus.
horizon_rationale.w2_w3: 2w C → 3w D: After BOJ decision absorbed (assume hold + neutral-to-hawkish), USDJPY either breaks 160 (triggers MOF verbal intervention, stabilizes) or pulls back. By w3, BOJ event risk gone, oil scenario depends on US-Iran talks (Islamabad round reported, ceasefire extended 3 weeks). If talks progress, oil retreats, ¥/bbl pressure eases, carry stabilizes, unwind risk drops to D. If talks collapse, oil re-spikes, grade stays C into w3. Base case: talks inch forward, carry stabilizes, D.
horizon_rationale.w3_w4: 3w D holds into 4w D: By w4, BOJ decision + oil path clarified. Baseline is no intervention, no surprise hike, ceasefire holds, carry regime sticky but contained. Unwind averted unless exogenous shock (e.g., Iran escalation, Trump policy shift). 4w grade D reflects low unwind probability in steady-state; scenario-weighted, not prediction. Key assumption: MOF tolerates 160-162 range, BOJ June hike priced smoothly, no vol spike.

watch_list: BOJ Ueda press conference tone Monday Apr 28 (hawkish on June = USDJPY tests 160; dovish = pressure eases)
USDJPY break above 160.00 (triggers MOF rate-checks, intervention risk jumps to 'cocked')
US-Iran Islamabad talks outcome this week (progress = oil retreats, yen import-cost pressure eases)
JGB 10Y break above 2.50% (rates stress signal; BOJ 'nimble action' on YCC ghost)
WTI crude above $100 or below $90 (above = ¥/bbl re-spikes, below = energy shock fades)
